name: Dried Tomato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and sauté until fragrant.
3. Add the sliced onions and dried tomatoes, stirring occasionally.
4. Cook for about 10 minutes or until the vegetables are soft.
5. Stir in the basil, oregano, rosemary, and ginger.
6. Add enough water to cover the ingredients by about 4-6 cups.
7. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered for about 20 minutes.
8. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
9. Taste and add salt if needed before serving.
This recipe makes a lovely brothy tomato soup. The dried herbs were crumbled into the pot as the onion and garlic cooked. All ingredients except garlic, olive oil, ginger, and water were homegrown and dried. Store-bought versions may not taste as good.
